name: lp-studio
description: Landing-page onboarding, design DNA, visual direction, selected-concept build, and on-page Studio editing workflow for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Brief, shape, explore, build, and visually tune landing pages.
interface.longDescription: LP Studio turns a landing-page idea into a usable brief, maps the industry-specific proof the page needs, creates service-specific design DNA, generates three visual directions, waits for a chosen direction, helps build from the selected visual target, then can add a gated on-page Studio mode for copy and layout polish. It is a standalone LP workflow and does not modify the Product Design plugin.
defaultPrompt: Create an LP brief, design DNA, and visual directions.
Onboard this SaaS landing page idea.
Turn this brief into design DNA and three LP concepts.
Add Studio mode so I can edit copy and positions on the rendered LP.
